name: Rye Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine dry ingredients and mix with 1-1/4 Cups water. Let the batter stand for a few minutes.
2. Spray a bit of non-stick cooking spray in a large non-stick skillet and rub it around with your fingers to distribute evenly over the pan surface. Heat the skillet over medium flame.
3. Stir the batter again; it will have a course texture from the rye flour but should pour from a spoon rather easily, like a medium-thick pancake batter. If the batter is too thick, add more water, 1-2 Tablespoons at a time until it is thin enough.
4. To make each pancake, spoon 2 or 3 Tablespoons of batter into the pan. You should be able to fit three or four cakes in the pan at a time.
5. As the cakes cook, bubbles will rise to the surface. When the tops of the cakes are full of bubbles and have begun to set, flip the cakes, cover the pan, and cook for 4 to 5 more minutes, until the cakes are dry inside. Remove cakes to a plate and repeat with remaining batter.
